diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on the detection of a 6.09 Mb deletion of the X chromosome in Patient 1 and a 2.49 Mb deletion in Patient 2, encompassing genes IL1RAPL1, DAX1, GK, and DMD. Both patients presented with intellectual disability, and Patient 2 also had elevated serum creatin kinase levels and muscular pain. The deletions were confirmed by microarray analysis and FISH, with random X chromosome inactivation observed in peripheral blood and muscle.
